title: Tête de Moine Value Chain: Challenges and Opportunities for a High-Quality Cheese Production in the Swiss Jura Region
description: This practice abstract examines the Tête de Moine PDO value chain in the Swiss Jura, highlighting its role in securing farm incomes through high-quality cheese production. It analyzes environmental, socioeconomic, and market challenges and proposes strategies such as service development, diversification, and actor coordination to enhance resilience and sustain livelihoods.
